question:
[PICTURE REQUIRED]
If 4,000 children were surveyed, how many have bedtimes that are 10:30 p.m. or earlier, according to the circle graph above?
diagram:
WEEKNIGHT BEDTIMES, AGE 11
28% 10:30 p.m.
12% 10 p.m.
13% Earlier than 10 p.m.
20% No bedtime
27% 11 p.m. or later

solution.strategy: Read the question carefully to determine the percentage of children with bedtimes of 10:30 p.m. or earlier, then calculate that percentage of the total surveyed.
